spec.name: The T-Crossing
spec.description: You are in a small hallway. There are doors to the east and to the west. To the south there are a black hole. There is writing in the wall. Wails can be heard from the south.

east.description: It is too dark to tell.

south.description: A black hole in the wall.

west.description: You can see a big fire to the west. It looks like a unhealthy place to enter!

extra_descs.description: The writing says 'The one to the east, belongs to the beast. To the west you will surely END your quest!'.
